# ASCEND - Complete Project Summary

## 📋 Project Overview

**ASCEND** is an AI-powered productivity RPG that gamifies personal development and task management. Users level up, earn rewards, and build streaks while completing personalized quests generated by AI.

**Repository:** https://github.com/aryandadhich333-blip/ascend-app

---

## ✨ Key Features

### 🎮 Gamification System
- **Progressive Levels** (1-100+)
- **XP & Coin Economy**
- **Daily Streak Tracking**
- **Achievement Badges**
- **Ranking System**

### 🎯 Quest Management
- **AI-Generated Quests** - Personalized using OpenAI
- **6 Difficulty Levels** - Very Easy to Elite
- **Multiple Categories** - Fitness, Development, Learning, Wellness
- **Success Criteria** - Clear goals and instructions
- **Skill Tracking** - Monitor improvements

### 📊 Analytics
- **Daily XP Tracking**
- **Skill Progress Dashboard**
- **Weekly Reports**
- **Milestone Celebrations**

### 🤖 AI Coach
- **Daily Recommendations**
- **Smart Routine Generation**
- **Progress Analysis**
- **Motivational Messages**

### 🎁 Reward System
- **Unlock Rewards** - Based on achievements
- **Custom Rewards** - Create your own
- **Freedom Time** - Break time rewards
- **Theme Unlocks** - Customization

---

## 🛠️ Technology Stack

### Frontend
```
React 18 + TypeScript + Vite
├── Tailwind CSS (Styling)
├── Framer Motion (Animations)
├── React Router (Navigation)
├── Axios (HTTP Client)
├── Lucide React (Icons)
└── Chart.js (Analytics)
```

### Backend
```
Node.js + Express + TypeScript
├── MongoDB (Database)
├── Mongoose (ODM)
├── JWT (Authentication)
├── bcryptjs (Password Security)
├── OpenAI API (AI Features)
└── CORS (Cross-origin)
```

### DevOps
```
Docker + Docker Compose
├── Containerization
├── Orchestration
└── Easy Deployment
```

---

```
ascend-app/
│
├── 📄 README.md                    # Project overview

│

│   │   │   ├── achievements.ts    # Achievement routes

│   │   │   └── coach.ts           # AI Coach routes
│   │   │
│   │   ├── middleware/
│   │   │   └── auth.ts            # JWT authentication
│   │   │
│   │   ├── services/              # Business logic
│   │   ├── server.ts              # Express app
│   │   └── [compiled code]
│   │
│   ├── package.json               # Backend dependencies
│   ├── tsconfig.json              # TypeScript config
│   ├── Dockerfile                 # Container image
│   └── .env                       # Environment variables
│
├── 📁 frontend/
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── pages/
│   │   │   ├── LoginPage.tsx      # Login page
│   │   │   ├── RegisterPage.tsx   # Registration page
│   │   │   ├── DashboardPage.tsx  # Main dashboard
│   │   │   ├── QuestsPage.tsx     # Quest list
│   │   │   ├── AchievementsPage.tsx
│   │   │   └── RewardsPage.tsx
│   │   │
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   │   ├── Navbar.tsx         # Navigation bar
│   │   │   ├── ProtectedRoute.tsx # Auth wrapper
│   │   │   └── CoachCard.tsx      # AI Coach widget
│   │   │
│   │   ├── contexts/
│   │   │   └── AuthContext.tsx    # Global auth state
│   │   │
│   │   ├── services/
│   │   │   ├── api.ts             # Axios config
│   │   │   └── index.ts           # API functions
│   │   │
│   │   ├── types/
│   │   │   └── index.ts           # TypeScript types
│   │   │
│   │   ├── styles/
│   │   │   ├── global.css
│   │   │   └── index.css
│   │   │
│   │   ├── App.tsx                # Main component
│   │   └── main.tsx               # Vite entry
│   │
│   ├── index.html                 # HTML template
│   ├── package.json               # Dependencies
│   ├── tsconfig.json              # TypeScript config
│   ├── vite.config.ts             # Vite config
│   ├── tailwind.config.js         # Tailwind config
│   ├── postcss.config.js          # PostCSS config
│   ├── Dockerfile                 # Container image
│   └── .env                       # Environment variables
│
└── 📁 docs/                        # Additional documentation
    ├── API_EXAMPLES.md            # API usage examples
    ├── TROUBLESHOOTING.md         # Common issues
    └── FAQ.md                     # Frequently asked questions
```

## 🚀 Getting Started

### 1️⃣ Quick Start (2 minutes)
```bash
git clone https://github.com/aryandadhich333-blip/ascend-app.git
cd ascend-app
npm install
npm run dev
```
Visit `http://localhost:3000`

### 2️⃣ Docker Start (Recommended)
```bash
docker-compose up
```

### 3️⃣ Manual Setup
Follow [QUICKSTART.md](./QUICKSTART.md) or [SETUP.md](./SETUP.md)

## 🔗 API Endpoints

### Authentication
```
POST   /api/auth/register
POST   /api/auth/login
```

### Users
```
GET    /api/users/profile
PUT    /api/users/profile
POST   /api/users/add-progress
```

### Quests
```
GET    /api/quests
POST   /api/quests
PATCH  /api/quests/:id/complete
```

### Achievements
```
GET    /api/achievements
POST   /api/achievements/unlock
```

### Rewards
```
GET    /api/rewards
POST   /api/rewards
PATCH  /api/rewards/:id/unlock
```

### AI Coach
```
GET    /api/coach/recommendations
POST   /api/coach/generate-routine
```

---

## 🎯 User Journey

```
1. Registration
   ↓
2. Onboarding (Set improvement areas)
   ↓
3. Dashboard (View stats)
   ↓
4. Quests (Browse available quests)
   ↓
5. Complete Quest (Gain XP & coins)
   ↓
6. Level Up (Unlock achievements)
   ↓
7. Claim Rewards (Use coins)
   ↓
8. Build Streak (Daily participation)
```

---

## 🔐 Security Features

- ✅ JWT Authentication
- ✅ Password Hashing (bcryptjs)
- ✅ Protected Routes
- ✅ Environment Variables
- ✅ CORS Configuration
- ✅ Type Safety (TypeScript)
- ✅ Server-side Validation

---

## 📊 Database Models

### User
- Profile info
- XP & Coins
- Level & Rank
- Streak tracking
- Improvement areas

### Quest
- Title & Description
- Difficulty level
- Category
- XP & Coin rewards
- Instructions & Tips
- Completion status

### Achievement
- Title & Description
- Icon/Badge
- Unlock date

### Reward
- Title & Description
- Unlock requirements
- Duration

## 🚢 Deployment Options

| Platform | Difficulty | Cost | Notes |
|----------|-----------|------|-------|
| **Heroku** | Easy | $7/mo | Best for beginners |
| **Vercel** | Easy | Free | Frontend ideal |
| **AWS** | Medium | $15-30/mo | Scalable |
| **DigitalOcean** | Medium | $5-10/mo | Good balance |
| **Docker** | Medium | Varies | Most flexible |

**See [DEPLOYMENT.md](./DEPLOYMENT.md) for detailed guides**

```bash
# Start development
npm run dev

# Docker start
docker-compose up

# Build for production
npm run build

# Deploy with Docker
docker-compose up -d
```
